name: ExplorerPy
description: Tool-kit for subdomain enumeration, directory brute-forcing, and port scanning. (⭐ 10+ Stars)

name: umap
description: An advanced URL filtering tool written in Go that intelligently filters out uninteresting endpoints to streamline recon.

name: SubSentry
description: A continuous monitoring tool that watches targets for new subdomains and sends real-time alerts via Discord webhooks.

name: Google Dorker
description: A client-side, precision dorking tool designed for authorized security recon and bug bounty hunting.

name: FavHunt
description: A fast, favicon-based asset mapping and technology fingerprinting tool for advanced reconnaissance.
